route.label: Agentic Coherence
route.description: The transition from ephemeral, prompt-based chat sessions to persistent background daemons that hold long-horizon human intent.

mappings.reason: Defining coherence as the computational persistence of intent.
Reading as the act that re-grounds long-horizon intent.

entries.title: Why Technology Still Needs Humanity
entries.intent_statement: Explore whether technology can amplify human judgment without replacing agency.
entries.central_question: Can a tool extend human judgment without quietly replacing it?
entries.core_insight: Technology becomes meaningful when joined to context, judgment, and care.

entries.title: Reading as an Active Operation
entries.intent_statement: Argue that reading should become an operation the reader performs, not content the reader receives.
entries.central_question: What changes if a page can be thought with, not just read?
entries.core_insight: The unit of reading shifts from the page to the passage you choose to act on.
